predictions.text: Chronic disease epidemic is biggest entrepreneurial opportunity in America over next decade
Premium meat brands will achieve billion dollar valuations like Blue Bottle Coffee did
Food system poisoning not just diet is primary driver of chronic disease and fertility decline
Fertility issues now common with 70% choosing one to two kids vs three to four due to conception delays
Focusing deeply on one problem area compounds founder brand relationships and expertise over 10+ years
Harvard brand value at risk from administration bloat 40% growth vs zero student growth in 20 years
